title: mediterranean-friendly norwegian chocolate cake
description: a nutty, crunchy, hangover-cure norwegian breakfast dish featuring plain chocolate and a tadka, perfect for a mediterranean-friendly diet
instructions: in a medium bowl, whisk together flaxseeds and almond milk. let it sit for 5 minutes.
melt chocolate over a double boiler or in a microwave-safe bowl in 30-second increments, stirring between each interval.
in a large bowl, whisk together ground almonds, hazelnuts, and eggs.
add tahini to the almond mixture and whisk until well combined.
add the melted chocolate to the almond mixture and stir until smooth.
add coconut oil and stir until fully incorporated.
add the flaxseed mixture to the cake batter and stir until well combined.
pour the batter into a greased 9-inch round cake pan.
bake in a preheated oven at 350°f for 40 minutes.
let the cake cool in the pan for 10 minutes before transferring it to a wire rack to cool completely.
